## what

<!-- one or two sentences describing the change -->

## why

<!-- the problem it solves or the value it adds -->

## tested

- [ ] loaded as unpacked extension
- [ ] pill renders on a fresh claude.ai conversation
- [ ] pill updates after sending and receiving messages
- [ ] popup settings save and persist (main tab)
- [ ] if calibration was touched: popup calibration tab works and permission flow is correct
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] no new console errors
- [ ] verified manifest still has minimal permissions

## checklist

- [ ] updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[unreleased]`
- [ ] no new runtime dependencies added (vendored bundle changes are fine)
- [ ] no expanded permissions in `manifest.json`
- [ ] if version was bumped: synced in `manifest.json` and `package.json`
